mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: proteinuria, neurological symptoms (restlessness, myopathy, decreased circulating IgG), splenomegaly, hepatosplenomegaly, follicular hyperplasia, liver involvement (cholecystitis, hepatomegaly)
skin pigmentation (purpura, hyperpigmented macules), arthropathy, joint pain (upper and lower limbs), renal impairment (proteinuria, kidney stones)
angiokeratomas, corneal opacities (presenile cataracts), gastrointestinal symptoms (abdominal pain, diarrhea), cardiac involvement (hypertension, left ventricular hypertrophy)

epilepsy, facial angiofibromas or fibrous plaque, nonreniform hamartomas of the brain, shagreen patches, hemangiomas, retinal phakoma, cardiac rhabdomyoma, renal angiomyolipoma, coarse facies, dental pits
short stature, skeletal deformity (long thorax, kyphoscoliosis), respiratory insufficiency (emphysema), hearing loss, corneal cloudiness
peripheral neuropathy, night blindness, cerebral atrophy, sensorineural hearing loss, osteodystrophy, acanthocytosis

congenital anomalies (thumb abnormalities, bicuspid aortic valve), bone marrow failure, growth deficit, increased susceptibility to infection, renal tubulopathy (albuminuria, aminoaciduria, glucose intolerance)

progressive muscular weakness, enlargement of heart and liver, feeding difficulties, delayed motor milestones, respiratory distress
mental deterioration, tall stature with disproportionately long arms and legs, characteristic face shape, hernias, testicular atrophy, hepatosplenomegaly, varicocele, carpal tunnel syndrome
